Hero.body: From concept to completion, precision, innovation, and excellence across Egypt's most iconic developments.

Home.whoTitle: More Than a Contractor, A Trusted Partner
Home.whoBody: Omega Technical Contracting Company was established through the merger of several private firms, each bringing decades of specialized expertise. We deliver premium-quality projects within the shortest timelines while maintaining exceptional standards of safety and performance.
Home.expertiseSubtitle: Since 2003, delivering excellence from concept to completion.
Home.spotlightBody: As main contractor of one of Egypt's most iconic towers, Omega is transforming the skyline of Egypt's new capital.
Home.quote: At Omega, our journey began with a vision to merge experience, precision, and innovation into a single force capable of shaping Egypt's construction landscape.

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Integrated Engineering & Construction Solutions Since 2003.
ServicesPage.sp1: Documentation control from kickoff to handover
ServicesPage.sp2: Safety, quality, and international standards alignment
ServicesPage.sp3: Clear coordination between owners, consultants, and suppliers
ServicesPage.sp4: Final delivery supported by complete records and training

AboutPage.title: Building Egypt's Future Since 2003
AboutPage.subtitle: Precision. Passion. Progress. A construction partner shaped by experience, discipline, and enduring client trust.
AboutPage.storyTitle: Experience unified into one precise construction force.
AboutPage.storyBody: Omega Technical Contracting Company was established through the merger of several private firms, each bringing decades of specialized expertise. This strategic unification enabled Omega to respond to the evolving challenges of the construction market with agility, precision, and a deep commitment to excellence.
AboutPage.teamBody: From architects and project managers to site engineers and skilled technicians, Omega is united by one mission: deliver work that endures.
AboutPage.industrialBody: Beyond contracting, Omega has expanded into strategic investments in Egypt's industrial sector through land acquisition in the Badr Industrial Zone, developing modern factories that support long-term vertical integration.

ProjectsPage.title: Our Portfolio of Excellence
ProjectsPage.subtitle: Landmark Projects Across Egypt in hospitality, commercial, residential, institutional, and mixed-use sectors.
ProjectsPage.scopeTitle: Main contractor delivery for a new capital icon.
ProjectsPage.locationValue: Tourist Towers District, New Administrative Capital
ProjectsPage.scope5: Smart Systems Integration & Central Air Conditioning
ProjectsPage.scope6: Coordination with international consultants and suppliers

PartnersPage.title: Our Partners & Clients
PartnersPage.subtitle: Trusted by Egypt's most prestigious hospitality groups, developers, consultants, and corporate brands.
PartnersPage.preferredSubtitle: Omega is the recommended main contractor for consultants, developers, and specialist firms across Egypt.
PartnersPage.privateSubtitle: Distinguished private commissions alongside Omega's corporate portfolio.

ContactPage.title: Get In Touch
ContactPage.subtitle: Ready to start your next project? Let's talk.
ContactPage.formSubtitle: Share the essentials and Omega's team can follow up with the right next step.

ContactForm.thanks: Thanks. This demo form is front-end only, so connect an email endpoint when ready.

Services.generalContractingSummary: Turnkey construction for residential, commercial, and hospitality projects.
Services.generalContractingDescription: Turnkey construction covering civil, architectural, and MEP works with strict adherence to safety, quality, and deadlines.
Services.designEngineeringSummary: Integrated architectural, structural, and MEP design with BIM coordination.
Services.designEngineeringDescription: Integrated design, BIM coordination, 3D visualization, and value engineering for buildable, cost-efficient solutions.
Services.interiorFitOutSummary: Luxury interior finishing for villas, hotels, and offices.
Services.interiorFitOutDescription: High-end finishing that combines craftsmanship, design precision, and durable functionality across premium environments.
Services.projectManagementSummary: Comprehensive oversight from planning to delivery.
Services.projectManagementDescription: Planning, scheduling, coordination, quality control, and risk management throughout every project stage.
Services.mepSummary: HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and fire-fighting systems.
Services.mepDescription: Design and installation of tested, commissioned, and optimized building systems for demanding projects.
Services.designBuildSummary: Single-point responsibility for design and construction.
Services.designBuildDescription: Integrated design and execution for faster delivery, tighter coordination, and clearer cost control.
Services.renovationSummary: Refurbishment and modernization of existing structures.
Services.renovationDescription: Modernization, preventive maintenance, system upgrades, and renovation works for operational assets.
Services.clientSupportSummary: Technical studies, procurement follow-up, and handover support.
Services.clientSupportDescription: Technical documentation, variation analysis, as-built records, procurement follow-up, and final handover.

Common.ctaText: Let's discuss your next project. Our team is ready to deliver the standard Omega is known for.

Footer.summary: Building Icons Since {year}. Omega brings precision, innovation, and premium delivery to landmark projects across Egypt.

AboutData.timeline2003: Company founded through the merger of specialized firms
AboutData.timeline2025: Obsidier Towers in the New Administrative Capital
AboutData.visionText: To remain a benchmark of efficiency and ethical professionalism, earning the privilege of being the first choice for clients seeking quality, trust, and innovation.
AboutData.goalText: To become one of the leading contracting companies in Egypt and the region, recognized for excellence in delivery and integrity in every endeavor.
AboutData.missionText: To continuously elevate the sophistication and quality of our work, exceeding client expectations and setting new standards in contracting.
AboutData.valueIntegrityText: Transparency, fairness, and respect in all our dealings
AboutData.valueCommitmentText: Time, energy, and expertise to honor every promise
AboutData.valueExcellenceText: Perfection through innovation and attention to detail
AboutData.valueLoyaltyText: Long-term relationships based on mutual respect
AboutData.valueQualityText: Rigorous systems and audits to ensure quality foundations
